content: Next.js flash-free dark mode: next-themes library injects a blocking inline script into the head that sets the theme attribute on <html> before paint, eliminating FOUC/flash regardless of SSR. Alternative: cookie-based approach reads theme cookie during SSR to pre-render correct attribute server-side, with a tiny correction script for first-load edge cases. Critical requirement: theme must be resolved before first paint, not after hydration.
